title: dendranthema erubescens
intro: Dendranthema erubescens, also known as the red-flowering chrysanthemum or Chinese chrysanthemum, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dendranthema erubescens include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and soothing digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and capsules, and can also be made into a topical cream or oil for skin and wound care.
